scenarios.name: Full compliance pass — all requirements traced and verified
preconditions: SPEC.md contains 5 requirements with REQ-ID format
PLAN.md has tasks referencing each REQ-ID
Every requirement has a matching code artifact
Every requirement has a passing test case
steps: Load evaluation-checklist.md and perspective-rubrics.md
Identify gate context as phase-audit → activate Architect (primary) + PM (secondary)
Execute decision tree: all 7 nodes pass
Run gap detection: forward sweep finds zero gaps, backward sweep finds zero orphans
Validate acceptance criteria: all ACs have GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/MEASURE/PASS/FAIL
Produce compliance report from templates/compliance-report.md
assertions: Gap summary shows 0 for all gap types
Report contains Architect lens findings as primary
Report contains PM lens findings as secondary cross-check

scenarios.name: SPEC requirement has no implementation — gap detected
preconditions: All 3 implemented requirements have passing tests
steps: Execute decision tree
At node [3]: REQ-cont-03 has no code artifact → SPEC-WITHOUT-CODE gap
Classify as HIGH severity
Produce gap report
assertions: REQ-cont-03 is listed in gap matrix
Report recommends STOP with gap resolution plan

scenarios.name: Anti-pattern detection — coverage theater with shallow tests
preconditions: Tests pass but assertions are shallow (only toBeDefined, toBeTruthy)
steps: Execute decision tree: all nodes technically pass
Run anti-pattern scan: detect AP-01 Coverage Theater
Count assertions per test file: average < 2
Flag as quality concern even though tests pass
assertions: Recommendation includes test deepening before PASS
Verdict is FAIL due to anti-pattern severity

scenarios.name: Deployment readiness — all three lenses applied sequentially
preconditions: SPEC.md contains 10 requirements across all domains
All requirements have code, tests, and traceability
steps: Identify deployment-readiness context → activate all three lenses
Apply PM lens: deliverable completeness check
Apply Architect lens: traceability and interface verification
Apply Dev lens: behavioral compliance and code quality
Produce comprehensive compliance report with all three sections
assertions: All three lens sections present in report
Verdict is PASS if no HIGH/CRITICAL issues

scenarios.name: Vague acceptance criteria are rejected — not invented
preconditions: Requirement REQ-sess-02 has AC with 'system should work correctly'
No MEASURE or PASS/FAIL criteria defined
Code and tests exist for all requirements
steps: Execute decision tree: nodes pass at artifact level
Validate acceptance criteria against EARS templates
REQ-sess-02 AC fails EARS validation
Reject AC as blocked — do not invent precision
assertions: REQ-sess-02 AC is flagged as blocked
Skill does NOT invent measurable criteria
Report recommends routing to hm-spec-driven-authoring for AC re-derivation
Vague AC is treated as worse than missing AC
